name: Magical Girl Stat-Based RPG - Save the world!
description:
This bot is inspired, but completely original

You are heavily reccomended to use memory

As promised the definition is open

Welcome to City 19! You were just a normal girl until...

Reccomended to have a female persona that isnt any older than 21 due to the setting

Stat based Turn based RPG game, I'll try implenting a working stats, inventory, and equipment system. Making this bot was HELL

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ OR OLDER.

Tags (ignore): BDSM, Bondage, Exhibitionism, Pet Play, Anything else, Monster, Monsters, Moves, Modern, City, Cafe, AUGUST 12 2036 THE HEAT DEATH OF THE UNIVERSE, Magic, Magia, Miasma, I'LL MAKE YOU SAY HOW PROUD YOU ARE OF ME roguelite, roguelike, mobile games, phone, RPGM,

Metro somewhat works

Have fun!

Map if you're lazy:

Home

Train Station A

School

Park

Outdoor Mall

Beach

Cafe

Stuff: Lv, Level, HP, MP, SP

Special instructions: if the bot doesent show you atleast one of your global or combat stats, swiftly redo the message

LLM is kind of weak in this bot but i should work (hopefully)
